name: Expansion VR
short_description: Expansion is a sci-fi Action RTS where deck-building strategy meets fast-paced VR duels — battle AI or challenge real players.
detailed_description:
Expansion VR reimagines real-time strategy for VR. Matches are short, intense, and built for competitive replayability. Every duel is a tactical showdown where quick decisions and smart strategy decide who survives.

Build and refine your custom deck of units — from agile swarmers to devastating siege beasts — and deploy them with motion-based control. Outsmart rivals, time your moves, and tear down the enemy’s Command Tower before they destroy yours.

Core Features

Deck-Building Strategy — unlock units and abilities  to create unique decks and tactics.
Fast-Paced Duels — short matches packed with intensity, perfect for both quick sessions and extended play.
Hands-On Control — immersive VR mechanics let you summon and command units with your hands.
Diverse Sci-Fi Arenas — battle across unique maps with distinct layouts and challenges.
Solo & Multiplayer Modes — test your skills against AI or face off with real players worldwide.
Active Development Roadmap — Expansion is in Early Access, with regular updates adding new maps, units, and features based on community feedback.

Expansion blends the tactical depth of RTS with the thrill of Action Strategy, brought to life in a sci-fi world where victory is in your hands.

In the far reaches of space, a ruthless battle for resources is underway. Your Company, once focused solely on profitable mining, now faces unwelcome competition. To secure your claims and protect your bottom line, you must rally veteran miners, repurpose heavy equipment, and recruit unlikely allies — from privateers to alien forces.

Lead your Company to victory, seize control of resource-rich asteroids, and expand your dominance ever outward.

These are your claims. This is your mining empire.

supported_languages:
English*, Ukrainian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
